'''babana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foetalism|foetalism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foetalism|foetalism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| babana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæbænæth|bæbænæth]] || [[word:bæbænæj|bæbænæj]] || [[word:bæbænæsh|bæbænæsh]] || [[word:bæbænæ|bæbænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bababanath|bababanath]] || [[word:bababanaj|bababanaj]] || [[word:bababanash|bababanash]] || [[word:bababana|bababana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:babanath|babanath]] || [[word:babanaj|babanaj]] || [[word:babanash|babanash]] || [[word:babana|babana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:babafnath|babafnath]] || [[word:babafnaj|babafnaj]] || [[word:babafnash|babafnash]] || [[word:babafnaf|babafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:babanatha|babanatha]] || [[word:babanaja|babanaja]] || [[word:babanasha|babanasha]] || [[word:babanaka|babanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:babanath|babanath]] || [[word:babanaj|babanaj]] || [[word:babanash|babanash]] || [[word:babana|babana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:babanathal|babanathal]] || [[word:babanajal|babanajal]] || [[word:babanashal|babanashal]] || [[word:babanakal|babanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:babanathatha|babanathatha]] || [[word:babanajaja|babanajaja]] || [[word:babanashasha|babanashasha]] || [[word:babanaka|babanaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:babanathan|babanathan]] || [[word:babanajan|babanajan]] || [[word:babanashan|babanashan]] || [[word:babanakan|babanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:babanathaoro|babanathaoro]] || [[word:babanajaoro|babanajaoro]] || [[word:babanashaoro|babanashaoro]] || [[word:babanakaoro|babanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
